title: 游戏界面截图
description:
案例「{argument name=」属于UI/界面设计。这是一张 UI/界面设计类案例，重点在界面组件、信息层级、按钮、卡片、导航、状态栏和交互元素的完整呈现。适合改成游戏 UI、App 界面、网页控制台、直播界面、品牌产品界面或 UI Kit。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed, realistic first-person video game screenshot of a next-generation voxel-based world. At the top center, a large, bold 3D 标志 reads "【game 标题：MINECRAFT 2】". The scene features a 【environment：lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the 背景】. The world blends realistic 光线ing, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a 【mob 1：blocky green creeper】 stands on the grass, while a 【mob 2：blocky brown wolf】 stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a 【held item：pixelated blue diamond sword】 in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat 图标s, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green high光线 b
prompt_raw: A highly detailed, realistic first-person video game screenshot of a next-generation voxel-based world. At the top center, a large, bold 3D logo reads "MINECRAFT 2". The scene features a lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a blocky green creeper stands on the grass, while a blocky brown wolf stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a pixelated blue diamond sword in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.

prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【产品/应用名称】的【界面类型】UI 画面。

界面主题：
这是一个面向【目标用户】的【应用场景】界面，核心功能是【核心功能】。

整体风格：
采用【视觉风格】，主色调为【主色调】，材质/质感为【材质效果】，整体保持专业、清晰、统一。

界面结构：
画面包含【顶部区域】、【主内容区域】、【侧边栏/导航区】、【底部工具栏】等部分。各区域之间层级清楚，留白合理。

组件内容：
加入【按钮】、【卡片】、【图标】、【输入框】、【状态标签】、【数据/文字信息】等 UI 元素。关键文字包括：【界面文字】。

展示要求：
像真实可上线产品界面或高质量 UI Kit，不要像随意拼贴。文字清晰，图标统一，边距、圆角、阴影和对齐关系精致。

输出比例：
画面比例为【画面比例】。

面文字","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_20","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"}]
